content: {"cards": [{"name": "Moorland Sentinel", "mana_cost": "{2}{W}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["W"], "color_identity": ["W"], "type_line": "Creature \u2014 Human Soldier", "oracle_text": "", "flavor_text": "\"The watchtowers of Gavony never sleep, and neither do those who guard them.\"", "power": "2", "toughness": "4", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Vanilla creature testing restraint. 2/4 body for 3 mana is slightly below the vanilla test (P+T should be CMC+3, so 6 total), but the defensive statline and white's focus on defensive creatures justifies this. Clean, simple design that fills the vanilla slot perfectly."}, {"name": "Radiant Pegasus", "mana_cost": "{3}{W}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["W"], "color_identity": ["W"], "type_line": "Creature \u2014 Pegasus", "oracle_text": "Flying\nLifelink", "flavor_text": "Its hooves leave trails of golden light across the battlefield.", "power": "2", "toughness": "3", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Keyword-only creature with two evergreen abilities that are quintessentially white. Flying and lifelink pair well together - evasive threat that gains life. Stats are conservative (5 total for 4 mana) due to having two relevant keywords. Both abilities are firmly in white's slice of the color pie."}, {"name": "Righteous Banishment", "mana_cost": "{1}{W}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["W"], "color_identity": ["W"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Exile target attacking or blocking creature.", "flavor_text": "\"Justice is swift for those who threaten the innocent.\"", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "White's primary exile-based removal at uncommon. Conditional on the creature being in combat, which is a classic white restriction that encourages defensive play. Efficiently costed at 2 mana because of the meaningful restriction. Fits white's color pie perfectly - exile removal that requires the opponent to be aggressive."}, {"name": "Scholarly Insight", "mana_cost": "{1}{U}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["U"], "color_identity": ["U"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Draw a card, then scry 1.", "flavor_text": "\"Knowledge is worthless without understanding.\"", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Classic blue cantrip with a minor additional effect. Draw a card replaces itself, then scry 1 provides card selection. Both effects are firmly in blue's wheelhouse. Appropriately costed at 2 mana for common - more expensive than Opt but provides more value. Tests proper MTG draw templating with the comma separation."}, {"name": "Dispel the Weave", "mana_cost": "{1}{U}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["U"], "color_identity": ["U"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Counter target noncreature spell unless its controller pays {2}.", "flavor_text": "\"Magic unravels when met with greater understanding.\"", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Counterspell variant that's narrow (noncreature only) but has a payment option. This creates interesting decision points - hard counter against instants/sorceries/planeswalkers, but gives opponents an out if they have extra mana. Costed aggressively at 2 mana due to the restrictions. Tests proper stack interaction templating with 'unless' clause."}]}
